塑料管材的外观颜色与内在质量的关系: The relationship between the appearance color and intrinsic quality of plastic pipes
我们平时见到的塑料管多为白色、蓝色和灰色，有人说白色塑料管无毒，灰色塑料管有毒，: The plastic pipes we usually see are mostly white, blue and gray. Some people say that white plastic pipes are non-toxic, while gray plastic pipes are toxic. Others think that gray plastic pipes are recycled pipes and are unwilling to use them. In fact, the toxicity of pipes does not depend on its appearance color, but on its inner quality. The so-called white color, blue color or gray color is produced by our company according to relevant regulations and the special needs of users, adding titanium dioxide, titanium blue or carbon black to the raw materials respectively. Whether white, blue, or gray pipes are toxic or non-toxic depends on whether the content of lead, cadmium, tin, mercury, and vinyl chloride monomer inside the pipe meets the national standards. It is unscientific to generally regard gray plastic pipes as recycled pipes. The sources of recycled pipe materials are different and the colors are mixed. For the sake of appearance, manufacturers must add a certain amount of colorant to deepen the color and dress up the appearance, either gray or black, but it cannot be concluded that all gray and black plastic pipes are recycled pipes.

The numbers in the triangular frame range from 1 to 7, and each number represents a type of plastic container with completely different meanings.

“01”代表PET（聚对苯二甲酸乙二醇酯），常用于制作矿泉水、碳酸饮料等瓶装饮料: "01" represents PET (polyethylene terephthalate), which is commonly used in the production of bottled beverages such as mineral water and carbonated drinks. As we all know, beverage bottles made of this material cannot hold hot water and are only suitable for holding warm or frozen drinks. If they are filled with high-temperature liquids or heated, they will easily deform and dissolve harmful substances to the human body. Scientists also found that this plastic product may release carcinogens after being used for more than 10 months. Therefore, it is recommended that you throw away the finished beverage bottles and do not use them as water cups or storage containers. To avoid causing harm to health, the gain outweighs the loss.
“02”不建议作盛水用具: “02” is not recommended as a water container
“02”代表HDPE（高密度聚乙烯），装有清洁用品、沐浴产品的塑料容器或是在商场: "02" stands for HDPE (high-density polyethylene). Plastic containers containing cleaning supplies and bath products or plastic bags commonly used in shopping malls are mostly made of this material. It can withstand high temperatures of 110°C and can be used to hold food if it is marked for food. Plastic containers containing cleaning supplies and bath products can be reused after careful cleaning, but they are often difficult to clean and leave residue behind, thus becoming a breeding ground for bacteria. As mentioned in the post, unlike other beverage bottles, the bottom of the 4L Nongfu Spring bottle is marked 02. Although it looks much stronger than ordinary mineral water bottles, it is not recommended to be used as a water container. Long-term use is very likely to produce harmful substances.
“03”代表PVC（聚氯乙烯），常见于雨衣、塑料膜。用该材质制成的塑料制品易产生: "03" represents PVC (polyvinyl chloride), which is commonly found in raincoats and plastic films. Plastic products made of this material are prone to produce two toxic and harmful substances: one is single-molecule vinyl chloride that is not fully polymerized during the production process, and the other is harmful substances in plasticizers. These two substances are easy to precipitate when encountering high temperatures and grease. If they accidentally enter the human body, they can easily cause cancer. Therefore, it is rarely used in food packaging. If you happen to encounter it, do not let it get heated.
“04”即LDPE（低密度聚乙烯），保鲜膜、塑料膜的原料，耐热性不强。合格的PE: "04" refers to LDPE (low-density polyethylene), the raw material of cling film and plastic film, and its heat resistance is not strong. Qualified PE cling film will melt when the temperature exceeds 110°C, leaving some plastic preparations that cannot be decomposed by the human body. And if it is wrapped outside the food and heated at the same time, the fat in the food will more easily dissolve the harmful substances in the plastic wrap.
“05”小心清洁后可重复使用: "05" can be reused after careful cleaning
“05”代表PP（聚丙烯），这是唯一能放入微波炉中加热的材质，所以成为了制作微波: "05" stands for PP (polypropylene), which is the only material that can be heated in a microwave oven, so it has become a raw material for making microwave lunch boxes. It is resistant to high temperatures of 130°C, has a melting point as high as 167°C, and has poor transparency. It can be reused after careful cleaning. It should be noted that some microwave lunch boxes are made of No. 05 PP (polypropylene) for the box body, but the lid is made of No. 06 PS (polystyrene). PS has good transparency, but is not resistant to high temperatures, so it cannot be put into the microwave oven together with the box body. Before heating the lunch box in the future, don’t forget to take off the lid first.
“06”即PS（聚苯乙烯），这是用于制造碗装泡面盒、发泡快餐盒的材质。不能用于盛: "06" means PS (polystyrene), which is the material used to make bowl-type instant noodle boxes and foam fast food boxes. It cannot be used to hold strong acids (such as orange juice) or strong alkaline substances, because it will decompose polystyrene (carcinogen) that is not good for the human body. Although it is heat-resistant and cold-resistant, chemicals will be released due to excessive temperature. Therefore, do not heat the bowl of instant noodles directly in the microwave!
“07”代表PC及其他类PC，是被大量使用的一种材料，多用于制造奶瓶、太空杯等，: "07" stands for PC and other types of PC. It is a material that is widely used and is mostly used to make baby bottles, space cups, etc. It is controversial because it contains toxic bisphenol A. Theoretically, as long as bisphenol A is 100% converted into a plastic structure during the production of PC, it means that the product does not contain bisphenol A at all, let alone releases it. However, no manufacturer can guarantee that bisphenol A has been completely converted, so you need to pay attention during use.
双酚A，温度愈高释放愈多，速度也愈快。若你手中恰好有编号为07的塑料制品，可采用: The higher the temperature, the more bisphenol A is released and the faster it is released. If you happen to have a plastic product numbered 07 in your hand, you can use the following methods to avoid it: do not heat it when using it, and do not expose it to direct sunlight; do not clean the kettle in a dishwasher or dishdryer; before using it for the first time, wash it with baking soda powder and warm water, and dry it naturally at room temperature; if the container is dropped or damaged in any way, stop using it immediately, because if there are fine pits on the surface of the plastic product, it is easy to harbor bacteria; avoid repeated use of aged plastic utensils.
日常生活中，饮料瓶、矿泉水瓶反复使用的现象十分普遍。不少消费者往往喜欢将自己使用: In daily life, it is very common for beverage bottles and mineral water bottles to be used repeatedly. Many consumers often like to keep their used beverage bottles and mineral water bottles, and then fill them with tea or drinking water when they go out next time. They call this "environmental protection" and "saving". Experts said that qualified beverage bottles and mineral water bottles are required to be made of food-grade plastic, that is, PET bottles. These food-grade PET bottles cannot withstand high temperatures and need to be used at low temperatures. They are generally safe to use below 70 degrees Celsius. In addition, these plastic bottles are single-use, and the state stipulates that companies cannot recycle or refill them.
塑料瓶在制作过程中添加有增塑剂，而该化学成分对人体有毒害作用，若长期用塑料瓶装饮: Plasticizers are added to plastic bottles during the production process, and this chemical component is toxic to the human body. If plastic bottles are used to fill drinking water, oil, wine and other substances for a long time, the harmful substances inside will easily dissolve and be brought into the human body. He suggested that it is relatively safer to use bottles made of glass, stainless steel and other materials to store food.

在太空中3D打印的第一个物件是3D打印机本身的一个备件。这是一个挤出机外壳，印上: The first object 3D printed in space was a spare part for the 3D printer itself. NASA的3D打印项目经理Niki Werkheiser说，第一次打印时，\"制: Niki Werkheiser, NASA's 3D printing program manager, said that when printing for the first time, "the artifact needs to make sense and be able to get test data from it."
\"这类事情或许对普通人来说显得枯燥无味。但却是我们首次在太空中加热并挤出塑料。: "This kind of thing may seem boring to ordinary people. But this is the first time we have heated and extruded plastic in space. The space station is the only laboratory platform that can provide microgravity."
自从11月24日首次成功打印以来，宇航员们开始尝试更大、更好、也更容易辨识的物件: Since the first successful print on November 24, the astronauts have tried bigger, better, and more recognizable objects, including a ratchet wrench. The drawings of the ratchet wrench were designed within a week, sent into space after approval, and took about four hours to print out. The consumable material was ABS 7006 filament. This is a true test of NASA’s on-demand 3D printing capabilities.
3D打印项目是NASA与总部位于加州的Made In Space公司签订的价值1: The 3D printing project is a $1.4 million Small Business Innovation R&D Program contract between NASA and California-based Made In Space. The first phase is to test the feasibility of astronauts producing parts and tools for their own use in a microgravity environment.
把添加制造技术带入太空最终将能很大程度减少从地球携带零部件和工具进入太空，节省高: Bringing additive manufacturing technology into space will eventually greatly reduce the need to carry parts and tools from the earth into space, save the high cost of space transportation ($10,000 per kilogram), and improve the self-sufficiency of the space station. The prototypes, parts and tools printed at this stage will eventually be brought back to Earth to be compared with the same object printed by the same printer on the ground.
Werkheiser说：\"我们将把所有样件带回地球，与地面对照品进行比较。我们: Werkheiser said: "We will bring all the prototypes back to Earth and compare them with terrestrial controls. We will also do a preliminary analysis through video. We found that parts with larger surface areas are not easy to remove. We need to study whether this is really caused by microgravity. Although this situation also occurs on the ground, it happens more frequently in orbit."
他指出，尽管打印机生产出来是一模一样的，但经过发射和微重力后可能有所变化。\"附: He points out that although the printer is produced exactly the same, it may have changed after launch and microgravity. "Adhesion is definitely one of our issues."
除了比较打印过程，太空中打印的零部件还要接受抗拉强度、扭矩和灵活性测试。测试结果: In addition to comparing printing processes, parts printed in space are tested for tensile strength, torque and flexibility. The test results will be provided to Made In Space to help refine its next-generation microgravity 3D printer, which is expected to be delivered early this year.
该项目接下来还有其他很多事要做。\"添加制造设备\"（缩写为AMF）现已投入开发: There's a lot more to come next for the project. The "Additive Manufacturing Facility" (abbreviated as AMF) has now been put into development. Werkheiser在描述太空国家实验室的情形时说：\"这将成为他们自己的打印机: "This will be their own printer, and NASA will be one of their customers," Werkheiser said, describing the Space National Laboratory. Made In Space公司把这比喻为\"太空中永久的生产车间”。: Made In Space company likens this to a "permanent production workshop in space."
他说：\"当然它将为宇航员所用，用于实验用途。但Made in Space公司还: He said: "Of course it will be used by astronauts for experimental purposes. But Made in Space will also launch a commercial version. Anyone who wants to do experiments on the space station can join this queue."
Werkheiser说，新系统要比原来微波炉大小的3D打印机更大一些，还将具备多: Werkheiser said the new system will be larger than the original microwave-sized 3D printer and will also have multi-material capabilities, most likely starting with PEEK and Ultem, thanks to their high strength, high safety ratings and superior thermal properties.
她说：\"Ultem已被用于生产各种舱外活动或太空漫步工具。虽然在太空中打印的质: She said: "Ultem has been used to produce various extravehicular activities or space walking tools. Although the quality of printing in space is still unknown, so far it has been successful."
把更强大的打印机送到从未有打印机留下足迹的地方，这并不是Made In Spac: Sending more powerful printers to places where no printer has ever gone before is not all part of Made In Space's partnership with NASA.
在2014年初，美国政府就签订了两份合约，每份价值125000美元，签约方分别为: In early 2014, the U.S. government signed two contracts, each worth $125,000, with Made In Space and Tethers Unlimited Inc. in Washington state. The goal is to develop a recycling machine to recycle 3D printed plastic parts or other plastics and regenerate them into usable raw materials. The program aims to send a regenerative technology demonstrator into space by 2016, Werkheiser said.
她说：\"两家公司已经把再生机器生产出来，并在地面上把不同的材料再生为长丝。\": "Two companies have produced recycling machines and regenerated different materials into filament on the ground," she said.
该计划的目标在于提高可持续发展能力：把包装材料，如泡沫、薄膜袋和气泡纸变为可再用: The goal of the plan is to improve sustainability: turn packaging materials, such as foam, film bags and bubble wrap, into reusable raw materials or use 3D printed raw materials to minimize the need for re-supply.
Lowery和Made In Space公司对其ABS再生系统R3-DO的细节守: Lowery and Made In Space are tight-lipped about the details of their ABS regeneration system, R3-DO, but their enthusiasm is palpable.
他说：\"这无疑是实现优化和提高资源利用的一项重要举措。如果3D打印机成为太空中: He said: "This is undoubtedly an important initiative to optimize and improve resource utilization. If 3D printers become the standard in space, combined with material regeneration, it is expected to achieve sustainable development in space and expand exploration to a large extent."
Tethers Unlimited公司已宣布了其太空再生计划Positrusio: Tethers Unlimited has announced its space regeneration program Positrusion and also envisions terrestrial applications.
该公司在去年的项目建议书中写道：\"这项拟议将开发一种长丝挤出机，采用名为Pos: The company wrote in its project proposal last year: "This proposal will develop a filament extruder, using a new extrusion process called Positrusion, designed on the ground, which can directly use ABS plastic waste pieces of any shape to optimize the production of small batches of positive control round filaments, while meeting the operating requirements of the space station. \"Positrusion工艺不适用于高产量的工业用途，但日益壮大的家用和办公用: "The Positrusion process is not suitable for high-volume industrial use, but a large proportion of the growing number of home and office 3D printer users will be interested in helping them effectively implement independent 3D printer material recycling."
地球上存在的塑料问题，比如闭环生产，有可能在太空中找到解决办法。: Plastic problems that exist on Earth, such as closed-loop production, may find solutions in space.
而NASA/Made In Space合作项目在接下来面临的太空3D打印的问题，: The problems faced by the NASA/Made In Space cooperation project in space 3D printing in the future will be completely opposite to the problems encountered by designers on the ground.
在国际空间站中没有上下移动，四面墙都可以使用。: There is no up or down movement in the International Space Station, all four walls are accessible.

NASA将把其专为太空设计的物品的CAD文件公开提供，让地球上的每个人都能自行将: NASA will make CAD files of its objects designed for space publicly available, allowing everyone on Earth to 3D print them themselves.

Lowery说，Made In Space正在认真考虑太空即用型塑料设计的未来发: Lowery said Made In Space is seriously considering the future of space-ready plastic design, challenging the current and future plastics industry and the wider field.

\"我们已经在太空中建立了生产车间，我希望大家与我们一起推动行业发展。我们已经拿: "We have built a production workshop in space, and I hope everyone will join us in advancing the industry. We have got the key, let's use the key to unlock the future. Find out new possibilities."
